name: web-ai-showcase site-wide image provenance ledger
description: Every raster image file served by the site, keyed by content hash, with provenance and a fail-closed people/rights policy. Source assets live in media/manifest.json; this ledger maps every on-site file (originals, cropped copies, re-encodes, QA screenshots, and first-party generated samples) to its provenance.
policy: Every tracked raster image file MUST have a ledger entry keyed by its content hash (fail-closed: an unknown/new image fails the gate).
Any image depicting an identifiable person MUST be rightsCleared with a source URL, creator, and SPDX/explicit license (fail-closed: unverified faces never ship).
People/face demo samples are licensed Wikimedia Commons images (PD/CC0/CC-BY/CC-BY-SA) or documented media-library assets; none are of unverified origin.
Procedural samples (illustrations, mock documents, synthetic textures, rendered text) are first-party generated for this project.
reports/ screenshots are derivative QA artifacts of first-party demo pages; screenshots embedding pre-relicensing people were removed.
